steps.note: Origin — idle to the spark (timer ~45s); a purely idle player still awakens.
Awakening: Study un-gates. Trickle Insight to afford the first cantrips (Stamina is scarce now, so Study auto-pauses — give it plenty of time).
Read the Page opens the web AND (first cantrip) claims the lair — Home opens.
Mend makes Study sustainable; Spark awakens Fire ▲ — the prerequisite for contracts.
Free the Study slot and take Ward a Barn (Running, repeatable): Renown + Gold + Iron Ore. Fire drain 0.15/s < Spark's 0.2/s trickle, so it self-sustains.
Move into the Inn (needs the lair). Work the contract until we have a name (Renown ≥ 12) and some Iron.
Climb to the RENT-FREE Mentor's Loft (free, needs Renown 12) so Gold can rest at its cap — then buy + equip the Coin Pouch (Gold cap 50 → 100).
Fill the purse to its cap (rent-free, so Gold rests exactly at 100), then buy + equip the Strongbox (Gold cap 100 → 250) — now we can hold the Site's 120.
Secure a Guild Charter (needs Renown ≥ 8 and 60 Gold).
Claim the Ruined Tower — the Site (the big 120-Gold sink).
Rebuild the purse to the 100 you must HOLD, then Found the Academy.
The finale: flag founded flips, phase → 'founded', the Academy tab un-greys.
